languages.text: "Ты многое пережил в Комморре. Как ты сейчас?"
"You endured a great deal in Commorragh. How are you now?"
languages.original_text: "Ты многое пережил в Комморре. Как ты сейчас?"

traits.locale_text: "You endured a great deal in Commorragh. How are you now?"
"You endured a great deal in Commorragh. How are you now?"
"You endured a great deal in Commorragh. How are you now?"

languages.text: «Ha soportado un gran sufrimiento en Commorragh. ¿Cómo se encuentra?».
languages.original_text: "You endured a great deal in Commorragh. How are you now?"

traits.locale_text: «Ha soportado un gran sufrimiento en Commorragh. ¿Cómo se encuentra?».

languages.text: “你在科摩罗吃了不少苦头。你现在还好吗？”
languages.original_text: "You endured a great deal in Commorragh. How are you now?"

traits.locale_text: “你在科摩罗吃了不少苦头。你现在还好吗？”

languages.text: « Vous avez traversé une épreuve terrible à Commorragh. Comment vous sentez-vous ? »
languages.original_text: "You endured a great deal in Commorragh. How are you now?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez traversé une épreuve terrible à Commorragh. Comment vous sentez-vous ? »

languages.text: "Ihr habt in Commorragh viel ertragen. Wie geht es Euch jetzt?"
languages.original_text: "You endured a great deal in Commorragh. How are you now?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt in Commorragh viel ertragen. Wie geht es Euch jetzt?"

languages.text: "コモラーではずいぶん耐えたね。今はどうですか？
languages.original_text: "You endured a great deal in Commorragh. How are you now?"

languages.text: "Commorragh'ta çok şeye katlanman gerekti. Şimdi nasılsın?"
languages.original_text: "You endured a great deal in Commorragh. How are you now?"

traits.locale_text: "Commorragh'ta çok şeye katlanman gerekti. Şimdi nasılsın?"
